description: Product Description Soft & Cozy These unisex baby slipper shoes are made of sock-like stretchy material with cute cartoon print, Soft rubber bottom are lightweight and comfrotable, your boy or girls will love wearing these pull-on slipper socks. Extra Round Toe Rubber Rubber shoe head protect baby's toes from injury, buffer impact. Easy On and Off. Baby First Walking Shoes Elastic Cuff The elastic closure ensures a secure fit, preventing the shoes from slipping off during playtime. Soft Rubber Sole Premium combed cotton upper, has excellent breathability, rubber shoes sole, flexible and lightweight, soft, absorb sweat and keep warm. Non Slip The baby sock shoes provides excellent traction, ensuring that your little walker can explore the world around them with confidence and stability. Anit Collision Our toddler sock shoes adds rubber shoe head to protect infant's toe from injury. Size Information CN Size 21/12.6cm Suit for baby's foot length 11.4-12.0cm, suggest for age 6-12 months; CN Size 22/13.2cm Suit for baby's foot length 12.0-12.5cm, suggest for age 12-18 months; CN Size 23/13.8cm Suit for baby's foot length 12.5-13.2cm, suggest for age 18-24 months; Note: Pls choose the size according to baby's foot length, age just for recommend.
